C:\MyGames\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\em++.bat -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -s USE_WEBGL2=1 -s FULL_ES2=1 -s USE_FREETYPE=1 -s ASYNCIFY -s FETCH=1 -s DISABLE_EXCEPTION_CATCHING=0 -s ASYNCIFY_STACK_SIZE=65536 --preload-file C:/MyGames/FirstRugieLikeDankaise/assets@/assets --shell-file C:/MyGames/FirstRugieLikeDankaise/web/index.html @CMakeFiles\isaac.dir\objects1.rsp -o web\index.html @CMakeFiles\isaac.dir\linkLibs.rsp
